title: 2016 Revised POEA Rules and Regulations Governing the Recruitment and Employment of Seafarers
content: The 2016 Revised POEA Rules and Regulations provide the legal framework for the recruitment and employment of Filipino seafarers. These rules aim to protect the rights and welfare of seafarers, ensure fair and ethical recruitment practices, and regulate the activities of recruitment agencies and employers involved in the maritime industry. The regulations cover licensing requirements, contractual obligations, wage standards, working conditions, dispute resolution mechanisms, and compliance monitoring.
